DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS ORDERED CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 14, 2004 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. IF COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WISHES TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE TO ARGUE THIS TENTATIVE RULING, GIVE NOTICE AS REQUIRED BY C.R.C. 324(A)(1), AND SHALL NOTIFY THE CLERK OF THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. (612/EHEWLETT)
